relativeTimestampRisk.description: Posts use relative timestamps ("an hour ago", "1 day ago", "1 month ago").
relativeTimestampRisk.highConfidencePosts: Posts within current week thread using "an hour ago" / "X hours ago" / "X days ago" (X <= 6) can be anchored to the thread header week.
relativeTimestampRisk.lowConfidencePosts: Posts with "1 month ago" or at thread boundary transitions cannot be pinpointed to exact calendar date.
relativeTimestampRisk.currentWeekAnchor: Week of 4/26/2026 thread is present (top of file). High confidence for recent posts.
relativeTimestampRisk.reconstruction: Must parse thread headers to get week anchor, then use post order + relative offset to reconstruct dates.
relativeTimestampRisk.lowConfidenceFlag: Mark any post that cannot be dated to within ±1 day as timestampConfidence: low.

We're back to 6592 in #ES_F and 6592-6623 remains a deep chop zone. Per newsletter ystd, 6592=key support. Overnight we held/trapped it, and rallied 60 points. Now, we are bac

satyDerivability.formula: Wilder ATR-14 on daily bars. Levels: prev_close ± (ATR * multiplier) for Fibonacci ratios [0.236, 0.382, 0.5, 0.618, 0.786, 1.0].
satyDerivability.leakageRisk: LOW - formula reads bars[bars.length-1] as reference. Backtest caller must slice to bars through date D-1 to prevent leakage.
satyDerivability.backtestRequirement: For each trading date D, call deriveSatyLevelsFromBars with daily bars sliced to include only dates < D. Never include bars from D or later.
satyDerivability.status: VERIFIED - formula accessible, derives valid levels from historical SPX daily bars, no lookahead if sliced correctly.
satyDerivability.note: No user-provided Saty source formula supplied. Using existing lib/saty-auto-pull.js. Recommend manual spot-check against a known live Saty output before using in confluence scoring.
satyDerivability.includeReason: Formula is verified and derivable from historical bars, but needs one manual spot-check against known live output before confluence use.

nextSteps: 1. Implement lib/backtest-data/bobby-export.js to normalize 892 BOBBY messages.
2. Implement lib/backtest-data/bobby-image-cache.js: match 668 local + attempt CDN download for 56 unmatched.
3. Implement lib/backtest-data/mancini-text.js: normalize mojibake, split posts, reconstruct dates using thread headers, flag low-confidence.
4. Implement lib/backtest-data/saty-historical.js: slice SPX daily bars to date D-1, call deriveSatyLevelsFromBars. Do one manual spot-check.
5. Acquire ES bars for 3 remaining missing date(s): 2026-03-23, 2026-03-24, 2026-03-25.
6. After coverage gaps documented, proceed to Phase 1 normalizer builds with tests.
